title: Persistence relies on experimental node:sqlite builtin (Node >=22.5)
evidence: src/db.ts:8 requires 'node:sqlite'; README.md:9 states 'Node.js 22.5+'. node:sqlite is a recent/experimental Node builtin, so the service won't run on older or non-Node-22.5 runtimes.
suggestion: Acceptable per the 'SQLite or embedded-equivalent' constraint; note the runtime floor and consider a fallback (e.g. better-sqlite3) for broader portability.

title: ?author= filter is exact-equality, not substring/case-insensitive
evidence: src/repository.ts:26 'SELECT * FROM books WHERE author = ?' matches the whole author string exactly.
suggestion: Spec only asks for an ?author= filter, which is satisfied; a LIKE/case-insensitive match would be more forgiving but is not required.

title: No test covers the 400 invalid-id branch on id routes
evidence: src/app.ts:42/55/72 return 400 for non-positive-integer ids, but tests/books.test.ts only exercises 200/201/400-validation/404/204 paths.
suggestion: Add a test for GET/PUT/DELETE /books/:id with a non-numeric id asserting 400 to lock in that branch.
